title: Filipino-Style Noodle Stir-Fry
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish inspired by Filipino cuisine, featuring stir-fried noodles, vegetables, and your choice of protein.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped vegetables and cook until they start to soften, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the noodles, soy sauce, and stir-fry sauce. Stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
